name: Aesop potion
description: Increases riding and dog-handling skills. If good quality, animals will take less notice of you and dogs won't bark at you.
instructions: Grind the comfrey and add it to the cauldron.
Add the boar's tusk to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the belladonna and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, distil.

name: Aqua Vitalis
description: Reduces loss of health and slows bleeding.
instructions: Add the dandelion to the cauldron and boil for 1 turn.
Grind the marigold and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 2 turns.
Finally, distil.

name: Artemisia potion
description: Increases strength and, if good quality, reduces how much stamina it costs to attack and defend.
instructions: Add the sage to the cauldron and boil for 1 turn.
Grind the wormwood and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 2 turns.
Finally, distil.

name: Bane poison
description: Depletes 110 health and therefore leads to certain death. In better quality, it depletes health faster. It's better for poisoning cauldrons than applying to weapons.
instructions: Add the wormwood to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the belladonna and add to the cauldron.
Boil for one turn using the bellows.
Add the fly agaric to the cauldron.
Finally, distil.

name: Bowman's Brew
description: Improves your archery skill and, if good quality, reduces loss of stamina while aiming.
instructions: Add the eyebright to the cauldron and boil for 3 turns.
Grind the St. John's wort and add to the cauldronpink.
Boil for 1 turn using the bellows.
Finally, distil.

name: Buck's Blood
description: Increases stamina and increases stamina regeneration if good quality.
instructions: Grind the St. John's wort and add it to the cauldron.
Add the comfrey to the cauldron and boil for 1 turn.
Add the dandelion to the cauldron and using the bellows, boil for one turn.
Finally, pour.

name: Chamomile decoction
description: Sleep heals you faster and if good quality, energy replenishes faster while sleeping.
instructions: Add the chamomile and boil for 1 turn.
Grind the sage and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Cockerel potion
description: Increases energy and in better qualities slows down fatigue.
instructions: Grind the mint and add to the cauldron.
Boil for 1 turn.
Add the valerian and boil for 2 turns.
Finally, distil.

name: Digestive potion
description: Reduces the feeling of fullness after food and cures food poisoning. If good quality, cures any poisoning, as well as boosting your vitality.
instructions: Add the thistle to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the nettle and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 1 turn.
Grind the charcoal and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Dollmaker poison
description: Disables running and reduces weapon skills. In better qualities, it also reduces Health. It's better suited to applying to weapons than poisoning food pots.
instructions: Add the herb paris to the cauldron and boil for 3 turns.
Grind the valerian and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 2 turns.
Finally, distil.

name: Embrocation
description: Increases Agility and in better qualities reduces how much stamina sprinting drains.
instructions: Add the poppy and valerian to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the eyebright and add it to the cauldron.
Add the boar's tusk and boil for 1 turn.
Finally, pour.

name: Fever tonicum
description: Fever and its complications can often end in death. This tonic will relieve and soothe the fever if given in time.
instructions: Add the feverfew and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the elderberry leaves and add them to the cauldron.
Add the ginger.
Finally, distil.

name: Fox potion
description: Improves speech and speeds up reading if good quality. Also increases the amount of experience gained if best quality.
instructions: Grind the St. John's wort and nettles.
Add them to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the charcoal and add it to the cauldron.
Add the belladonna and boil for 1 turn.
Finally, pour.

name: Hair o' the Dog
description: Reduces drunkenness or, in better quality, removes it completely. In better qualities it also helps with hangovers or alcoholism.
instructions: Add the sage and St. John's wort to the cauldron.
Boil for 3 turns.
Grind the mint and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Lead shot gunpowder
description: Gunpowder used to fire lead shot that even the best plate armour can't stop at close range. For safety reasons, load only when sober.
instructions: Grind the sulphur and saltpetre and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 2 turns.
Grind the charcoal and add to the cauldron.
Boil for two turns.
Pour into a mortar and grind.

name: Lethean Water
description: If you want to put to rights the imprudent choices of your life, all it takes is 1 mouthful, and you can chose your perks anew. Beware, though, the procedure is irreversible and painful!
instructions: Grind the wormwood and add it to the cauldron.
Add the belladonna and brew for 3 turns.
Add the henbane.
Finally, distil.

name: Lion perfume
description: A strong but short-lasting perfume. Substantially increases charisma for short periods, but reduces charisma if combined with another perfume.
instructions: Add the sage to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the mint and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Lullaby potion
description: Reduces energy to 0. Reduces stamina regeneration if good quality. Suitable for applying to weapons and for poisoning cooking pots.
instructions: Add the poppy and boil for 1 turn.
Add the thistle and boil for 1 turn.
Grind the herb paris and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Mandrake decoction
description: Heals health over a period of time. In better qualities, it increases Vitality and unblocked strikes deplete stamina less.
instructions: Add in the mandrake and boil for 1 turn.
Grind the river pearl and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 1 turn.
Grind the sage and add to the cauldron.
Using the bellows, boil for 1 turn.
Finally, distil.

name: Marigold decoction
description: Gradually heals part of your health. Helps against hangover, or cures it immediately if good quality.
instructions: Add the nettle to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the marigold and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Mintha perfume
description: A weak but long-lasting perfume. Slightly increases charisma for a long period, but reduces charisma if used with another perfume.
instructions: Grind the dandelion and mint and add them to the cauldron.
Boil for 2 turns.
Add the marigold to the cauldron and boil for one turn using the bellows.
Finally, distil.

name: Moonshine
description: Henry's home-brewed moonshine. A strong drink that is sure to put you in a good mood.
instructions: Add the wormwood to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the mint and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 1 turn.
Finally, distil.

name: Nighthawk potion
description: You will see better in the dark and your energy will deplete slower or if good quality, not at all.
instructions: Grind the eyebright and add it to the cauldron.
Add the belladonna and boil for 3 turns.
Grind the chamomile and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.

name: Painkiller brew
description: Lessens the effects of wounds and reduces the amount by which maximum stamina decreases with health.
instructions: Grind the poppy and add it to the cauldron.
Add the marigold and using the bellows, boil for one turn.
Add the comfrey and boil for 2 turns.
Finally, distil.

name: Quickfinger potion
description: Increases thievery and craftsmanship skills.
instructions: Add the cobweb and eyebright to the cauldron and boil for 3 turns.
Grind the valerian and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 1 turn.
Finally, pour.

name: Scattershot gunpowder
description: Gunpowder for shooting scrap iron and other small projectiles. Will pierce anything with ease at close range, but is ineffective at long range. For safety reasons, load only when sober.
instructions: Grind the sulphur and saltpetre and add them to the cauldron.
Boil for 3 turns.
Grind the infused charcoal and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 1 turn.
Pour into a mortar and grind.

name: Saviour Schnapps
description: Saves the game and if good quality, boosts strength, vitality and agility.
instructions: Add the nettle to the cauldron and boil for 2 turns.
Grind the belladonna.
Add the belladonna to the cauldron and boil for 1 turn.
Finally, pour.

name: Soap
description: You can't wash your own clothes without soap.
instructions: Grind the thistle and add it to the cauldron.
Boil for 2 turns.
Add the dandelion to the cauldron and boil for 1 turn.
Grind the charcoal and add it to the cauldron.
Finally, pour.
